containerOverrides.name: migrate
command: import pg from 'pg'; import { readFileSync, readdirSync } from 'fs'; import { createHash } from 'crypto'; import { join } from 'path'; const c = new pg.Client({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL, ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } }); await c.connect(); try { const m = await c.query('SELECT id, hash, created_at FROM drizzle.__drizzle_migrations ORDER BY created_at'); console.log('already_applied', m.rows.length, JSON.stringify(m.rows.map(r=>r.id))); } catch (e) { console.log('journal empty or missing:', e.message); } const dir = '/app/packages/db/src/migrations'; const journal = JSON.parse(readFileSync(join(dir,'meta/_journal.json'),'utf8')); for (const entry of journal.entries) { const file = entry.tag + '.sql'; const sql = readFileSync(join(dir, file), 'utf8'); const hash = createHash('sha256').update(sql).digest('hex'); const exists = await c.query('SELECT 1 FROM drizzle.__drizzle_migrations WHERE hash = $1', [hash]).catch(()=>({rows:[]})); if (exists.rows.length) { console.log('skip', file); continue; } console.log('apply', file); try { await c.query(sql); await c.query('INSERT INTO drizzle.__drizzle_migrations (hash, created_at) VALUES ($1, NOW())', [hash]).catch(async ()=>{ await c.query('INSERT INTO drizzle.__drizzle_migrations (id, hash, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, NOW())', [entry.idx, hash]); }); console.log('ok', file); } catch (err) { console.error('FAIL', file, err.message); process.exit(1); } } console.log('all done'); await c.end();
